display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 280px; text-align: center; width: 280px;

span.p:
Single Gemini API Call
response_modalities: TEXT, IMAGE
Gemini 2.5 Flash

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 280px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Parse Interleaved Parts
text → scene narrative
image → scene illustration
woven together in one response

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 280px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Visual DNA Pipeline
Anchor portraits → Gemini Vision
→ 150-word descriptors

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 280px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Imagen 3 (1024×1024)
Character sheet + Visual DNA
→ consistent illustrations

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 280px; text-align: center; width: 280px;

span.p:
Tiered Fallback
Imagen fail → Gemini native image
Tier 2 → Tier 1 → Tier 0

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 280px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Gemini Native Audio
Multi-voice narration
Emotion-aware TTS

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 280px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Per-Scene Analysis
Mood · Tension · Craft notes
Creative suggestion
